metadata.description: QA Annotator — Claude Code plugin + Chrome extension for QA/QC. Plugin auto-detects project stack, crawls Figma, syncs reports to Jira via MCP. Extension lets QA click any element to log a styled issue with a deeplink to the matching Figma frame.

plugins.name: qa-tooling
plugins.description: 4 slash commands for QA/QC: /qa:init (auto-detect stack → qa-profile.json), /qa:figma-sync (crawl Figma → qa-figma-tree.json), /qa:doctor (health check), /qa:sync (push QA report to Jira via MCP).
